Meet your new favorite piece of cookware.

Our Carbon Steel Cookware is perfect for cooking out on the grill, on the stove, or even over an open flame.

Professional-grade Carbon Steel is natural and free from harmful chemicals, making it the ideal tool for clean, healthier cooking. Its versatility, lightweight construction, and ability to develop a naturally non stick surface make it the chef’s go-to for high-performance cooking.

All of our Carbon Steel Pieces are made without:
• PFAS
• PFOA
• PTFE
• BPA
• Lead
• Cadmium
• Aluminum

🍳 Naturally Non Stick Surface: Pre-seasoned and ready to use, improving with each meal you cook.

body:
Since the 1600s, the world’s best Plateware has come from Stoke-on-Trent, England, where the local clay and craftsmanship creates uniquely hard-wearing high alumina vitrified china. Prized for its beauty, longevity, and unrivaled chipping resistance, it’s historically been reserved for the hospitality industry—until now.

We’re the first to bring this legacy Plateware to home cooks. Most Plateware is mechanically top glazed, leaving an unfinished “foot” that causes scratching when stacked. Our fully-glazed Plateware is suspended on pins for 360-degree glazing, leaving behind three small “beauty marks”—not blemishes—that are the sign of fine craftsmanship. The glazing makes each piece chip- and scratch-resistant, in addition to being oven safe to 580F, so delicate sauces won’t break due to the temperature shock of a cold plate.

Discover the elegant bowl/plate hybrid that’s as beautiful on its thousandth meal as it is on its first.

Meticulously crafted in Sweden from pure Carbon Steel, it’s lightweight yet built to handle heat up to 1200°F. From the ergonomic handle to the universally compatible flat base, every detail is designed for effortless, restaurant-quality cooking at home.

Made without harmful chemicals and featuing a naturally non stick surface, healthier cooking has never been easier.

Crank up the heat, toss with confidence, and cook like a pro. Backed by a lifetime warranty, this Wok will quickly become your go-to in the kitchen.

*All of our Carbon Steel Pieces are made without: PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, BPA, Lead, Cadmium, and Aluminum.

body:
Since the 1600s, the world’s best Plateware has come from Stoke-on-Trent, England, where the local clay and craftsmanship creates uniquely hard-wearing high alumina vitrified china. Prized for its beauty, longevity, and unrivaled chipping resistance, it’s historically been reserved for the hospitality industry—until now.

We’re the first to bring this legacy Plateware to home cooks. Most Plateware is mechanically top glazed, leaving an unfinished “foot” that causes scratching when stacked. Our fully-glazed Plateware is suspended on pins for 360-degree glazing, leaving behind three small “beauty marks”—not blemishes—that are the sign of fine craftsmanship. The glazing makes each piece chip- and scratch-resistant, in addition to being oven safe to 580F, so delicate sauces won’t break due to the temperature shock of a cold plate.

Discover the elegant bowl/plate hybrid that’s as beautiful on its thousandth meal as it is on its first.

body:
Have you tried cooking on carbon steel yet? If not read more here 👇

Carbon steel is one of our favorite cookware materials. As a staple in professional kitchens that's beloved by French chefs, it's rapidly becoming more popular in home kitchens around the world.

Carbon steel pans are known for their heat retention abilities; they’re excellent at everything from oven roasting to searing and stir-frying. They’ve been tested on all manner of stovetops (including induction), on the grill, in the oven, and even over an open flame, with the same exceptional result every time.

Plus, at roughly half as much as cast iron, carbon steel makes it way easier to flip crepes, toss vegetables, and transfer your pan from stove to oven.

See why Made In is a world leader in Carbon Steel cookware.

body:
Since the 1600s, the world’s best Plateware has come from Stoke-on-Trent, England, where the local clay and craftsmanship creates uniquely hard-wearing high alumina vitrified china. Prized for its beauty, longevity, and unrivaled chipping resistance, it’s historically been reserved for the hospitality industry—until now.

We’re the first to bring this legacy Plateware to home cooks. Most Plateware is mechanically top glazed, leaving an unfinished “foot” that causes scratching when stacked. Our fully-glazed Plateware is suspended on pins for 360-degree glazing, leaving behind three small “beauty marks”—not blemishes—that are the sign of fine craftsmanship. The glazing makes each piece chip- and scratch-resistant, in addition to being oven safe to 580F, so delicate sauces won’t break due to the temperature shock of a cold plate.

Discover the elegant bowl/plate hybrid that’s as beautiful on its thousandth meal as it is on its first.

All of Made In's Stainless Steel Pieces made are without: PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, BPA, Lead, and Cadmium.

body:
Think Stainless Steel is hard to use? Think again.

Most people struggle with Stainless Steel because they don’t know the secret—it’s all about heat control. With Made In Stainless Steel, you get:

• No Coatings, No Toxins, Free from Harmful Chemicals
• Expertly Made in Italy With Award-Winning 5-Ply Stainless Steel
• Naturally Non Stick With Proper Heat Control
• Fast, Even Heat for Perfect Sears and Sautés
• Built to Last a Lifetime, Backed by a Lifetime Warranty

Professional chefs trust us. Now it’s your turn.

All of Made In's Stainless Steel Pieces made are without: PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, BPA, Lead, and Cadmium.
